zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence於1185年出生在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡斯卡時，他的父親Alphonse II roi d'Aragon28歲，母親Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón31歲。他於1193年7月與Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1209年2月2日在法國藍多-盧希隆培列內-利塔利斯培爾皮南享年24歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納孔卡 德 巴波亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence于1185年出生在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡斯卡时，他的父亲Alphonse II roi d'Aragon28岁，母亲Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón31岁。他于1193年7月与Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o艾--普洛福斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1209年2月2日在法国藍多-盧希隆培列內-利塔利斯培爾皮南享年24岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞塔拉戈納孔卡 德 巴波亞。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Prince
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: nickname from Middle English, Old French prince (from Latin princeps).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Prinz ‘prince’, or its Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or some other Slavic cognate Princ, from princ ‘prince’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Primc: status name for one who lives in the house of his father-in-law, from a derivative of primiti ‘to accept, to take over’.

variants.name: Prinz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Matthias, Ulrich, Arno, Friedrich, Hans, Klaus, Mechthild.

German: nickname from Middle High German prinze ‘prince’, presumably denoting someone who behaved in a regal manner or who had won the title in some contest of skill. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Czechia.

nameMeanings.name: Alphonse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Spanish Alfonso, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin. It is probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready, prompt’. Alternatively, the first element may be ala ‘all’, hadu ‘struggle’, or hild ‘battle’ forms are found to support each derivation, so it is possible that several Visigothic names that were originally distinct have fallen together. The -ph- spelling is the result of classical influences (or classical pretensions). St Alphonsus was a 9th-century bishop of Astorga, who spent the last years of his life at the abbey of St Stephen de Ribas de Sil in Galicia. Alphonse has been occasionally used in the English-speaking world, especially among West Indians and African Americans. The Latinized form Alphonsus has been used in Ireland as an equivalent of the Gaelic name Anluan .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence was born in 1185, in Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Spain, his father, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, was 28 and his mother, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, was 31. He married Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier in July 1193, in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 2 February 1209, in Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, at the age of 24, and was buried in Conca de Barberà, Tarragona, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence est né en 1185, à Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Espagne, son père, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier en juillet 1193, à Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 février 1209, à Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterré à Conca de Barberà, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence 1185 in Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alphonse II roi d'Aragon 28 und seine Mutter Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón 31. Er hat im Juli 1193 in Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Februar 1209 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich und wurde in Conca de Barberà, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence è nato il nel 1185 nel Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Spagna, il suo padre, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier nel luglio 1193, nel Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 febbraio 1209, nel Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolto a Conca de Barberà, Tarragona, Catalunya, Spagna.

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence(이)가 1185년 스페인 아라그o 후스카 후스카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alphonse II roi d'Aragon(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1193년 7월 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 아이스--프로븐스에서 Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1209년 2월 2일 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 p이ee스-리탤스 p르피그난에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 터아라곤아 콘카 데 바버a에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence nasceu em 1185, em Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier em julho de 1193, em Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1209, em Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, com 24 anos, e foi sepultado em Conca de Barberà, Tarragona, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence родился в 1185 г. в местности хуеска, хуеска, арагoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Alphonse II roi d'Aragon было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier июль 1193 г. в местности эикс-ен-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 февраля 1209 г. в местности пирпигнан, пирeнeес-ориентеилесь, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция в возрасте 24 лет и был похоронен в местности конка де барбирa, таррагона, каталуня, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prince Alphonse II of Prince Comte de Provence nació en 1185, en Huesca, Huesca, Aragón, España, su papá, Alphonse II roi d'Aragon, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Sancha De Castilla y Leon Queen of Aragón, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Garsende de Sabran comtesse de Forcalquier en julio de 1193, en Aix-en-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1209, en Perpignan, Pyrénées-Orientales, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultado en Cuenca de Barberà, Tarragona, Cataluña, España.
